title: FTX exec’s wife scheduled for November trial on campaign finance charges
summary: A Manhattan judge ordered that Michelle Bond’s criminal trial start in November after he denied a motion to dismiss the indictment based on claims that prosecutors misled her husband over her charges.

title: Lula Ally Leaves Senate Leadership Job Amid Ties to Bank Scandal
summary: The Brazilian Senate leader from President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s party stepped down from his post after a police investigation uncovered connections to failed lender Banco Master.

title: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
summary: Illinois is set to institute a new tax on prediction markets next week that would take 15% of gross receipts from sports-related wagers.
